title: Summer Jazz Evening
description: An open-air live jazz concert featuring local artists at the central park.

title: Workshop on Baking Bread
description: Learn the art of sourdough and artisanal baking from master chefs.

title: Community Gardening Drive
description: Help plant green trees and establish a community herb garden in the town square.

title: Classical Symphony Night
description: A wonderful orchestra night playing Mozart and Beethoven under the stars.

title: Art and Pottery Workshop
description: Get hands-on experience on the pottery wheel and paint your own ceramic pot.
